documents.title: Gateway Cost Analysis Requirements Description
documents.shortDescription: Program-level cost analysis requirements description used to frame scope, assumptions, and estimating discipline.

documents.title: Gateway WBS Dictionary
documents.shortDescription: Controlled definition of the Gateway WBS hierarchy and the intended meaning of each major element.

documents.title: Gateway Data Guide
documents.shortDescription: Guide to source IDs, traceability rules, and interpretation boundaries across the Gateway source library.

documents.title: Gateway Cost Basis of Estimate
documents.shortDescription: Narrative basis-of-estimate document covering scope, reserve treatment, annual phasing logic, and remaining judgment.

documents.title: Gateway WBS Hierarchy Dataset
documents.shortDescription: Tabular WBS hierarchy with parent-child structure, responsibility assignments, and short element descriptions.

documents.title: Gateway Cost Estimate Rollup
documents.shortDescription: Top-level cost estimate rollup by WBS branch with explicit-dollar fields, basis types, and traceability notes.

documents.title: Gateway Cost Estimate Detail
documents.shortDescription: Detail-level cost lines supporting grouped rollups, reserve visibility, fiscal-year allocation, and deeper traceability.

documents.title: Gateway Cost Phasing by Year
documents.shortDescription: Year-by-year current-cost phasing with explicit labor, material, integration, and total-cost values.

documents.title: Gateway Section B Pricing Evidence
documents.shortDescription: Priced contract line-item evidence retained as direct numeric support for portions of the Gateway estimate.

documents.title: Gateway Master Schedule Extract
documents.shortDescription: Task-level schedule extract with dates, predecessors, milestone flags, and critical-task indicators.

documents.title: Gateway Program Milestones
documents.shortDescription: Named program milestones with date basis, source IDs, confidence annotations, and related task links.

documents.title: Gateway Risk Register
documents.shortDescription: Program and schedule-linked risk register with likelihood, consequence, mitigation, and supporting source references.

documents.title: Gateway Contract Documents Tracker
documents.shortDescription: Tracker linking controlled documents to WBS elements, milestones, source roles, and evidence roles.

documents.title: Gateway Source Reference Register
documents.shortDescription: Register of public and internal references used across the Gateway source library.

documents.title: Gateway Glossary
documents.shortDescription: Reference glossary of terms used across the Gateway source library to keep terminology consistent across artifacts.
